v1CreateFieldSchemaCustomizationRequest.description: Request to create a field schema customization, which restricts the allowed values for a specific field on a CRM object type within a namespace.

crmObjectType.description: Required. The CRM object type the field belongs to (e.g. "contact", "company", "opportunity").

namespace.description: Required. The namespace (partner ID or account group ID) the customization applies to.

v1CreateFieldSchemaCustomizationRequest.title: Create Field Schema Customization Request

pipelineId.title: The identifier of the pipeline created

crmObjectSubtype.title: Some kind of objects have subtypes, this is used mainly by custom objects

fields.title: A CRM object is composed of several fields containing values

idempotencyId.title: Used to uniquely identify this object

v1DeleteFieldSchemaCustomizationRequest.description: Request to delete a field schema customization for a specific field on a CRM object type within a namespace.

crmObjectType.description: Required. The CRM object type the field belongs to (e.g. "contact", "company", "opportunity").

fieldId.description: Required. The field ID whose customization should be deleted.

namespace.description: Required. The namespace (partner ID or account group ID) the customization applies to.

label.title: Human readable value of the option

archived.title: If this schema was archived, this will have a value

created.title: Timestamp of the creation of the schema

crmObjectSubtype.title: Subtype of the object that contains the field, only used for responses, ignoring it on requests

crmObjectType.title: Type of the object that contains the field, only used for responses, ignoring it on requests

dropdownOptions.title: Options of values for the field (dropdown or constrained strings)

externalId.title: Alternative identifier for the field, not required

fieldDescription.description:
Description of the field
This description should indicate when the field requires values from the dropdown_options list.

namespace.title: Namespace can be either a PID or an AGID

readonly.title: Flag to signal if this field cannot be updated by the user or not

skipAutomation.title: Flag to signal if automations should not handle changes on objects when this field is changed

updated.title: Timestamp of the last update of the schema

namespace.description: For create or update requests, this should be omitted.

v1FieldType.description:
- FIELD_TYPE_DROPDOWN: FIELD_TYPE_DROPDOWN is passed as a string in the field_value
 - FIELD_TYPE_CURRENCY: FIELD_TYPE_CURRENCY is passed as a Currency message containing a code and value
 - FIELD_TYPE_EMAIL: FIELD_TYPE_EMAIL is passed as a string in the field_value
 - FIELD_TYPE_PHONE: FIELD_TYPE_PHONE is passed as a string in the field_value
 - FIELD_TYPE_TAG: FIELD_TYPE_TAG is passed as a StringList in the field_value
 - FIELD_TYPE_GEOPOINT: FIELD_TYPE_GEOPOINT is passed as a Geopoint message containing lat and long fields in the field_value

v1FieldValue.description:
FieldValue represents one of the fields of a crm object (Contact, Company,
etc...) On Create/Update we need the field_id or external_id filled, with the
field_id taking precedence over external_id.
When retrieving both field_id and external_id will be returned.

externalId.title: An external identifier for the field, not required

values.title:
This is repeated to support operations that take zero or more than one value.
For example
   isEmpty()
   isAnyOf(a, b, c)
   isBetween(date1, date2)

hasFilterOptions.description: If set, the filter has specific options that may be shown in a dropdown.

customObjectTypes.title: the list of custom object types retrieved

v1GetMultiFieldSchemaCustomizationReques.description: Request to retrieve field schema customizations for the specified fields on a CRM object type within a namespace.

crmObjectType.description: Required. The CRM object type the fields belong to (e.g. "contact", "company", "opportunity").

fieldId.description: Required. The field IDs whose customizations should be retrieved.

namespace.description: Required. The namespace (partner ID or account group ID) to look up customizations for.

v1GetMultiFieldSchemaCustomizationReques.title: Get Multi Field Schema Customization Request

v1GetMultiFieldSchemaCustomizationRespon.description: Response containing the requested field schema customizations.

fieldSchemaCustomizations.description: The field schema customizations that were found. Fields without a customization are omitted.

v1UpdateFieldSchemaCustomizationRequest.description: Request to update an existing field schema customization on a CRM object type within a namespace.

crmObjectType.description: Required. The CRM object type the field belongs to (e.g. "contact", "company", "opportunity").

namespace.description: Required. The namespace (partner ID or account group ID) the customization applies to.

v1UpdateFieldSchemaCustomizationRequest.title: Update Field Schema Customization Request

namespace.title: Namespace can be either a PID or an AGID

message.title: Validation message, this can be a translation key

paths.description: The set of field mask paths.

vendastatypesFieldMask.title: `FieldMask` represents a set of symbolic field paths, for example:

cursor.description: Optional. An opaque token from a previous response's next_cursor to retrieve the next page of results. Omit or leave empty for the first page.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of items to return per page.

hasMore.title: Whether or not more results exist

nextCursor.title: A cursor that can be provided to retrieve the next page of results

totalResults.title: The total number of results. This is not supported on all paged apis and will be 0 if it is not supported

scopes.crm: Allows the application to manage all data in your CRM
scopes.crm.association: Allows the application to manage associations in your CRM
scopes.crm.association:read: Allows the application view-only access to associations in your CRM
scopes.crm.company: Allows the application to manage your CRM companies
scopes.crm.company:read: Allows the application view-only access to CRM companies
scopes.crm.contact: Allows the application to manage your CRM contacts
scopes.crm.contact:read: Allows the application view-only access to CRM contacts
scopes.crm.custom-object: Allows the application to manage your CRM custom objects
scopes.crm.custom-object:read: Allows the application view-only access to CRM custom objects
scopes.crm.opportunity: Allows the application to manage your CRM opportunities
scopes.crm.opportunity:read: Allows the application view-only access to CRM opportunities
scopes.crm.schema: Allows the application to manage your CRM object schemas
scopes.crm.schema:read: Allows the application view-only access to CRM object schemas

requestBody.description: Request to create a field schema customization, which restricts the allowed values for a specific field on a CRM object type within a namespace.
Request to delete a field schema customization for a specific field on a CRM object type within a namespace.
Request to retrieve field schema customizations for the specified fields on a CRM object type within a namespace.
Request to update an existing field schema customization on a CRM object type within a namespace.
